subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nemba lupusano
topics: Luno lufunjisho lwaimena pa kutwezha bafunda milanguluko yazhika pa kwamba amba
Byonse bijimo: Uno mutwe ubena kutala pa mafunjisho abiji.
